column1: Category 4 (Tier-3) - Tissue Binding Factor B_k Partition Coefficients

Protein-water K_prot (serum albumin, plant/storage proteins), phospholipid membrane-water K_PL (=K_MW), and cell-wall K_cw. Per-CF2 QSPR slopes are VERIFIED; absolute per-congener K values must be read from the cited primary tables.

column4: value

column11: PRIMARY slope for K_PL(chain length). Use for the membrane-bound fraction in B_k. 60 PFAS measured (Wellington stds).
PFSA membrane affinity > CF2-matched PFCA. Two independent slope estimates (0.37 vs 0.53).

column4: order: PFSA = ether-sulfonic > polyfluoro-COOH > FTUCA > phosphate-diester = PFECA
column11: Ether bond (PFECA, e.g. GenX) REDUCES K_MW; n:2 FTS < PFSA (extra CH2 raises headgroup pKa). Apply for replacement species.

column4: K_MW and membrane permeability P_d (per-congener in source)
column11: BRIDGES to C6: gives membrane permeability P_d for your GHK/diffusive term as well as K_PL. Confirm DOI.

column2: Serum albumin affinity vs chain length
column4: U-SHAPED (inverted-V); optimum ~C6-C10
column8: Chen et al. 2025 (HSA); cross-species ToxSci 199:132; Li et al. 2021 (Toxics 9:63)
column11: NOT monotonic - matches the U-shaped uptake BAF in C5 (optimum C6-C9). C4-C5 and C10-C12 bind WEAKER. Key for B_k(chain length).

column4: K_BSA/w for 14 PFAAs (per-congener in source)
column8: Allendorf, Berger, Goss, Ulrich, 2019 (ESPI 21:1852-1863); Bischel et al. 2011 (ETC 30:2423)
column11: Serum albumin = standard bulk-protein surrogate. Absolute K_BSA/w values in source tables. DOIs to confirm (Allendorf likely 10.1039/c9em00290a).

column2: PFAA binding to plant vs animal proteins
column4: BSA >> C-phycocyanin = soy protein isolate (weaker)
column8: Zhou, Liu, Yuan, Ruan, Chen, 2025 (Ecotox. Environ. Saf. 291:117902)
column11: KEY for PLANT B_k: soy protein isolate is a STORAGE protein (grain analog). Plant proteins bind WEAKER than serum albumin -> B_grain via storage protein lower than animal-based estimates. Electrostatic + Trp-mediated; no conformational change. QSAR descriptors: Egap, net charge, ionic volume.

column4: specific, high-affinity binding (per source)
column11: Specific high-affinity protein. Plant analog would be lipid-transfer proteins (LTPs) - not measured (gap). Use only if modeling a specific high-affinity pool.

column4: pectin + hemicellulose = critical PFAS binding sites; TF 3.07-58.6 (18 PFAS)
column11: Identifies the cell-wall COMPONENTS for K_cw (pectin, hemicellulose). HFPO oligomers & 6:2 Cl-PFESA accumulate MORE than PFOA/PFOS. No partition coefficient given (gap).

column4: PFOS 45.6-58.4% in cell wall; PFOA 46.2-70.8% water-soluble
column11: Long-chain/sulfonate partition MORE to cell wall -> higher B_root for PFOS. Quantitative K_cw still absent (gap).

column2: Apoplast (cell wall) vs symplast vs transmembrane
column4: cell-wall (apoplastic) binding governs root retention
column11: Apoplastic cell-wall binding sets the B_1 (root) retention term and the chain-length cutoff (couples with C5 Casparian-strip filter).

column4: what it gives
K_MW + K_PW for 60 PFAS; per-CF2 slopes; HSA optimum C6-C10. Single best source.
PLANT proteins (soy protein isolate, C-phycocyanin) + BSA; QSAR. Most relevant to plant B_k.
Foundational membrane-water K_MW set for PFAS (PFOS/PFOA + analogues).
K_MW AND membrane permeability P_d (bridges to C6) + toxicokinetic effects.
BSA-water partition for 14 PFAAs (10 classical + 4 alternatives).
Root cell-wall pectin/hemicellulose as PFAS binding sites; TF for 18 PFAS.
U-shaped affinity, optimum 6-9 C; BSA/PSA/RSA comparison.
Short-chain PFAA - serum albumin associations & mechanisms.
